mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, NICKNAME, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTHDATE, GENDER, ADDR_SIDO, ADDR_SIGUNGU, RESIDE_AREA_CODE, RESIDE_SIGUNGU_CODE, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, SOCIAL_PROVIDER, EXP_POINT, TITLE_ID, CREATED_AT, SOCIAL_ID, role, STATUS, SUSPENSION_END_DATE FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}
